summary: Iteration 56 - Tested Internal Chat System Phase 1B. Backend API tests: 15/15 passed. Frontend UI tests: Chat panel opens, conversations list shows, message history displays, message sending works, status indicators (✓ sent, ✓✓ delivered) visible, back button works, directory tabs functional. Found 2 issues: 1) WebSocket connection failing (infrastructure issue), 2) Starting new conversation from influencer directory fails because influencer records lack user_id field.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection fails - likely Kubernetes ingress not handling WS upgrades. REST API polling fallback works correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking 'Enviar mensaje' on influencer profile fails with 404 because influencer.user_id is null

integration_issues.issue: API call to /api/internal-chat/start-conversation?recipient_id=null fails because influencer records in DB don't have user_id field populated

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/internal-chat/conversations - returns conversation list - PASS
Backend: GET /api/internal-chat/conversations/{id}/messages - returns message history - PASS
Backend: POST /api/internal-chat/messages - sends message successfully - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/internal-chat/messages/{id}/read - marks message as read - PASS
Backend: GET /api/internal-chat/unread-count - returns unread count - PASS
Backend: GET /api/directory/influencers - returns influencer list - PASS
Backend: GET /api/directory/producers - returns producer list - PASS
Backend: Message status flow (sent -> delivered -> read) - PASS
Frontend: Floating Island opens chat panel - PASS
Frontend: Directory tabs (Influencers, Vendedores, Chats) visible - PASS
Frontend: Conversations list shows with last message preview - PASS
Frontend: Opening conversation shows message history - PASS
Frontend: Sending message adds it to conversation instantly - PASS
Frontend: Message status indicators (✓ sent, ✓✓ delivered) visible - PASS
Frontend: Back button returns to chat list - PASS
Frontend: Influencer directory shows influencer cards - PASS
Frontend: Vendedores directory shows 2 producer cards - PASS
action_items: HIGH: Fix influencer records in database to include user_id field linking to users collection
MEDIUM: Investigate WebSocket connection issues - may need Kubernetes ingress configuration for WS upgrade support
LOW: Consider adding fallback in frontend when user_id is null to show appropriate error message
critical_code_review_comments: InternalChat.js line 796: startConversationWith(selectedInfluencer.user_id) - user_id can be null if influencer record not linked to user
Backend /directory/influencers endpoint correctly returns user_id from influencer record, but data integrity issue exists
WebSocket reconnection logic in InternalChat.js is good - retries after 3 seconds on disconnect
REST API polling fallback (10 second interval) works correctly when WebSocket fails

success_rate.frontend: 90% (WebSocket failing, start conversation from directory failing)

seed_data_creation: Used existing conversation conv_f01ee36854f6 between producer and influencer
context_for_next_testing_agent: Internal Chat Phase 1B testing complete. Key findings: 1) All REST API endpoints working correctly, 2) WebSocket connection failing (infrastructure issue - ingress not handling WS upgrades), 3) Starting new conversation from influencer directory fails because influencer records in 'influencers' collection don't have user_id field populated - they need to be linked to user accounts in 'users' collection. The existing conversation between producer (user_testprod001) and influencer (test-influencer-1770861440332) works correctly for testing message flow.

rca_of_issue.issue: Starting new conversation from influencer directory fails
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Influencer records in 'influencers' collection were created without user_id field. The frontend calls startConversationWith(selectedInfluencer.user_id) which passes null to the API.
reproduction_steps: 2. Open chat panel via floating island
4. Click on any influencer card (e.g., Maria Influencer)
6. Error toast appears: 'Error al iniciar conversación'
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Update influencer records in database to include user_id field that links to corresponding user in users collection. Alternatively, create user accounts for existing influencers and update the influencer records.
